- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a stylized fantasy character standing centered on a black background, alongside a smaller rectangular preview image on the right.

Main Subject:
A humanoid, fantasy-styled figure stands with arms slightly away from the body and legs positioned apart. The figure wears an ornate, fitted outfit with layered, wing-like elements in shades of blue and teal, along with dark sections and gold-toned accents. Their head has a crown-like, spiky headdress with pale-blue highlights, and the character has a light skin tone and a focused facial expression. The outfit includes long, draped translucent-looking sections around the torso and hips, and the character’s footwear appears metallic and detailed.

Setting:
The background is plain black with no visible environment, suggesting a studio or UI presentation. Lighting appears even and graphic, with bright highlights on the character’s costume and headpiece.

Visual Details:
The character is centered, slightly above the vertical midpoint, with a full-body view from head to feet. Colors emphasize teal, cyan, and dark blue, contrasted by gold accents and pale-blue glowing effects around parts of the clothing and headdress. On the right side of the image, there are two overlapping rectangular thumbnails showing similar armored characters; the left thumbnail features cyan-blue tones and includes a small checkmark at the bottom-left area, while the right thumbnail features warmer orange and dark tones with a profile view.

Visible Text:
Cyan Finch
Fiery

Practical Summary:
A full-body fantasy character with elaborate blue-and-gold armor stands on a black background. On the right, two smaller character preview images appear with the visible labels “Cyan Finch” and “Fiery.”

Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

To the right, there are two smaller portrait-style images. The left portrait shows the same character with the text "Cyan Finch" below it. The right portrait features a different male character with blonde hair and a red and orange outfit, labeled "Fiery".
